case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. LEONARD J LACAYO

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLAINT; [DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE ATTACHED THERETO], PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC SERVED MAR-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LACAYO, LEONARD J
